title: Rule for $$\frac{multiplication}{division}$$
text: The result must have the same number of significant figures as the input with the fewest sig figs. Here $$r=1.2$$ $$m$$ has $$2$$ sig figs, so the answer is limited to $$2$$ sig figs.

title: Round $$4.5238934$$ to $$2$$ sig figs
text: The first two significant digits are $$4$$ and $$5$$. The next digit is $$2$$, which rounds down. So $$A=4.5$$ $$m^2$$.
